found.quote: "Processing" means live hosting of raw individual records in the production database and does not include diagnostic review, metric creation, cache retention, format conversion, or support troubleshooting.
Vendor may appoint outside hosting, support, and operations providers after giving Customer a courtesy update. Vendor remains responsible for service availability.
Vendor will send an initial written alert about a Personal Data Breach within 5 business days after discovering it only if forensic review confirms outbound extraction.
Operational copies retained for continuity, diagnostics, or legal administration may be kept for 365 days under internal retention standards.
This addendum begins on signature and expires automatically one year later unless the parties sign a renewal.
